title: Join Two Tables
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. The finance team needs each order shown next to the buyer's name. Join `users` and `orders` so the result has the user `name` and the order `total`. Match `orders.user_id` to `users.id` with an INNER JOIN.
objectives: Match the rows with an ON condition
hints: INNER JOIN combines rows that match in both tables.
The ON clause states how the two tables relate: orders.user_id = users.id.

files.content:
-- TODO: bring in each buyer name alongside the order amount from the other table
SELECT total FROM orders;

parseRules.failMessage: Combine the tables with a JOIN.
